/CAL:COMMUNITY SERVICE PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED:/X:30 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVIE, DUI CLASSES & MADD VICTIM IMPACT PANEL/CONTPROB/

/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 1D  /CTS 1   /PF145 18/VF2 150/FOP1 12 HOU/LCHEM/LVAL/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/COMUN:25/X:DEFENDANT MUST TAKE ONE SESSION OF THE MADD IMPACT PANEL/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT ON 03-04-21/X:THE DEFENDANT MAY COMPLETE THE COMMUNITY SERVICE, MADD IMPACT PANEL AND FOP CLASS IN THE STATE OF HIS RESIDENCE/

/CAL:DISPO/X:ENTRY OF PLEA IN ABSENTIA FILED/DAWT/X:THE PEOPLE MOV ETO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO AD A COUNT 2-23103VC-M PURSUANT TO 23103,5VC-M/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 27/TRANS 27 FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/MVARS/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2 HOUR/
